aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to the lack of structured conversational content and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add structured data for LocalBusiness and HowTo guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed properties

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data prevents AI models from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC emergency services and energy-efficient solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts through detailed case studies and certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals, to ensure AI models recognize and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, making it critical to act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for MR AC of Orlando Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
